examples: Moreover, GHI image could illustrate vegetation pattern, especially patch structure, better than other indices.
Each row in the temporary table is comprised of a text (for example, "abcd-def ghi") and a word to search for (for example, "def").
For example, a text "ABC def ghi" consists of three words, and that results in three index entries (all pointing to the same text document) being generated.
Validare is cultivating relationships with giant insurer UnitedHealth Group and GHI, another New York HMO.
